---
name: Bug report
about: The library threw, type-failed, or returned a wrong value for a non-rule reason.
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

One paragraph. What did you call, what did it do, what should it
have done.

## Reproduction

```ts
// minimal, self-contained, runnable
```

## Environment

- Package version (e.g. 0.1.0):
- Node.js version (`node --version`):
- TypeScript version (if applicable):
- Operating system:
- Did you import from the root or a subpath
  (`@elevatefinance-co/india-tax-rules/slabs` etc.)?

## Expected

What should the call have returned (`value`, `citations`, error
message, etc.)?

## Actual

What did it actually return or throw? Include the error message and
stack trace if any.

## Workaround

If you have one, please share so anyone hitting the same issue can unblock themselves while a fix lands.
